findings.message: Discovery schema_version must be 0.1.
Discovery must be ready.
Discovery must be discovery-only.
Discovery must not install dependencies.
Discovery must not download models.
Discovery must not run discovered tools.
Discovery must not read private content.
Discovery must keep public-ready at 0.
Discovery must include at least ten search queries.
Discovery must report queries with results.
Discovery must report lanes with results.
Discovery must include a query for bim_rag_workers.
Discovery must include a query for ifc_reasoning.
Discovery must include a query for kosmo_prepare.
Discovery must include a query for kosmo_asset.
Discovery must include a query for worker_integration.
